info.name: Inistnt API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Inistnt platform

**Setup:**
1. Import this collection
2. Import `Inistnt.postman_environment.json`
3. Run `Auth / Staff Login` first to get token
4. Run `Auth / Send OTP` + `Verify OTP` for user token

request.description: Call this after app login / Firebase token refresh
One-time. ₹100 wallet mein add hoga. Apna code use nahi kar sakte.

item.name: Worker: Get My Review for Booking

request.description: Wallet se deduct hoga. SILVER=₹199, GOLD=₹499, PLATINUM=₹999

exec: console.log('✅ cityId set to Lucknow:', lko?.id);

request.description: Set redeemPoints: true to use loyalty points (max 20% discount).
Worker booking start se PEHLE selfie bhejta hai. AI Gemini se check hoga. Response instant hai, AI async mein chalega.

body.raw:
{
  "serviceId": "{{serviceId}}",
  "cityId": "{{cityId}}",
  "addressId": "{{addressId}}",
  "lat": 28.6139,
  "lng": 77.209,
  "scheduledFor": null,
  "redeemPoints": true,
  "userNotes": "Points redeem karke discount chahiye."
}

request.description: redeemPoints: true set karo. Max 20% discount milega available points se.

Razorpay dashboard mein webhook URL set karo: https://yourdomain.com/api/v1/payments/webhook
Event: payment.captured
Yeh route Razorpay seedha call karta hai — koi auth nahi, signature verify hoti hai internally.
Get last 50 messages. Add ?before=<messageId> for pagination.
Returns sessionId. Use sessionId to connect via WebSocket.

Connect after getting sessionId from /calls/initiate.

Both caller and receiver connect to same sessionId.

SEND (Caller):
  {"type":"OFFER","sdp":{...}}  — WebRTC offer
  {"type":"ICE_CANDIDATE","candidate":{...}}
  {"type":"HANGUP"}

SEND (Callee):
  {"type":"ANSWER","sdp":{...}}  — WebRTC answer
  {"type":"DECLINE"}

PTT ONLY:
  {"type":"PTT_START"}  — hold to talk
  {"type":"PTT_STOP"}   — release

RECEIVE:
  {"type":"RINGING"}   — callee notified
  {"type":"ACCEPTED"}  — callee answered
  {"type":"CALL_ENDED","reason":"hangup"}
  {"type":"PTT_SPEAKING","speakerId":"..."}
Sends to resolved audience immediately. Must be APPROVED first.

body.raw:
{ "slug": "welcome_user", "nameEn": "Welcome User", "nameHi": "User Swagat", "subject": "Inistnt mein aapka swagat hai, {{name}}!", "bodyHtml": "

Namaste {{name}}!

Aapka account ready hai.

", "variables": [ "name", "mobile" ] }
